title: podman machine ssh ignore machine name on Windows/HyperV
body:
### Issue Description

Running `podman machine ssh machine_name` gives an error message

`Error: vm podman-machine-default not found: podman-machine-default: VM does not exist`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `set CONTAINERS_MACHINE_PROVIDER=hyperv`
2. `podman machine init mymachine`
3. `podman machine start mymachine`
4. `podman machine ssh mymachine`


### Describe the results you received

Error: vm podman-machine-default not found: podman-machine-default: VM does not exist

### Describe the results you expected

Entering the machine

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Win11Pro

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: I'm not able to reproduce this with main or 5.1.1.  There must be a detail we are missing to trigger the failure.  I also created the `podman-machine-default` machine for WSL.  In the meanwhile, adding a `--log-level=debug` might trigger a clue.
